# spinner

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Spinning refresh icon for loading states. Renders MdRefresh with animate-spin; defaults to always spinning, accepts spinning={false} to pause.
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `build`, `conversations-recover`, `conversations/conversation-view/op-status`, `debug/worktree-cleanup`, `primitives/folder-picker`, `primitives/loading`
- Web:
  - Exports: Types: `SpinnerProps`; Values: `Spinner`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
